description.value: Price +1 bonus; Aura moderate illusion; CL 10th; Weight â DESCRIPTION This special ability can only be placed on melee weapons. A menacing weapon helps allies deal with flanked foes. When the wielder is adjacent to a creature that is being flanked by an ally, the flanking bonus on attack rolls for all flanking allies increases by +2. This ability works even if the wielder is not one of the characters flanking the creature. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells phantasmal killer; Cost +1 bonus
